title: FrostedUI
description: This resource pack makes your UI look icey!
body:
This resource pack makes your UI look cool and blue (like ice!)
[I'm aware of the furnace type UI thingys having gray stuff behind them at the arrow and fire icon im not that smart so idk how to fix it itll maybe be fixed one day k thx]
Heres a quick video showing the changes it makes! <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/kWLyOHIyKls" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
